_comment: Workplace-connector registry + feature-flag contract. Teachers connect only the tools their district/school/classroom allows; unused connectors are flagged off to save time/resources. Each connector declares the normalized EVIDENCE it can provide so a skill (e.g., meeting-classifier) can use whatever is available and DEGRADE/CONVERGE via alternates when one is off. Offline contract — this registry describes what each connector WOULD provide; we build NO provider auth/API clients. Live retrieval is realized by the HOST AI's native integration (Claude / OpenAI / Gemini / etc.) when the deployment has connected it, or via manual paste / uploaded files (incl. .ics/.eml) through shared/docintel/. A district may RESTRICT specific evidence even when a connector is active (see per-deployment 'restricted_evidence' + reason); skills then take what they can get and look elsewhere. Prose: connectors.md. Per-deployment flags: feature-flags.example.json (schema: connector.schema.json).

connectors.label: Uploaded file (read via shared/docintel/)
connectors.auth_note: none — teacher uploads .ics/.eml/.pdf/.docx; read via docintel

connectors.label: Google Workspace (Gmail / Calendar / Drive / Docs)
connectors.auth_note: realized by the host AI's native Google integration when the deployment connects it; no client built here. Minimum-necessary scopes; the district may restrict which evidence is shared.

connectors.label: Google Classroom
connectors.auth_note: realized by the host AI's native Google Classroom integration when connected; no client built here.

connectors.label: Microsoft 365 (Outlook mail+calendar / OneDrive / SharePoint)
connectors.auth_note: realized by the host AI's native Microsoft 365 integration when connected; no client built here. Minimum-necessary scopes; the district may restrict which evidence is shared.

connectors.label: Microsoft Teams
connectors.auth_note: realized by the host AI's native Microsoft Teams integration when connected; no client built here.

connectors.label: Zoom
connectors.auth_note: realized by the host AI's native Zoom integration when connected; no client built here.

connectors.label: Canvas LMS
connectors.auth_note: realized by the host AI's native Canvas integration when connected; no client built here.

connectors.label: Blackboard Learn
connectors.auth_note: realized by the host AI's native Blackboard integration when connected; no client built here.

connectors.label: Salesforce (district CRM)
connectors.auth_note: realized by the host AI's native Salesforce integration when connected; no client built here.

connectors.label: Student Information System (Skyward / PowerSchool / Focus / etc.)
connectors.auth_note: district-managed; realized by the host AI's native SIS integration if the district connects one (uncommon). AUTHORITATIVE for student data when connected — used first unless overridden; on conflict with the local store, raise with the user (see shared/students/student-data-policy.md).
